name: List Files
description: Lists files in a directory on the server. Use to find uploaded photos/files before passing them to `capture`. Common paths: '/files/inbox' (drop zone for new uploads), '/files/receipts', '/files/inventory'. Returns file names, sizes, and whether each entry is a directory.
author: Michael

path.description: Required. Absolute path starting with /files, e.g. '/files/inbox' or '/files/inventory/tools'. Use '/files' to see top-level directories.
